title: AUTISM SPECTRUM DISORDER PROGRAM - 211info
text: NORTHWEST REGIONAL EDUCATION SERVICE DISTRICT CLATSOP SERVICE CENTER AUTISM SPECTRUM DISORDER PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides licensed special education teachers with specific teaching experience, training, and knowledge in the area of Autism Spectrum Disorder (ASD). These services support districts as they work to build the capacity of their special education teams. Examples of this work include developing staff knowledge of the characteristics of ASD, classroom-based strategies, evidence-based practices (EBPs), and assessment requirements and procedures. 785 Alameda Avenue Astoria, OR 97103 Eligibility: Ages 5-21, medical or health assessment is required as part of the educational eligibility process Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4:30pm Email (503) 338-3358 .12.. Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 325-2862 Main phone (503) 325-1297 FAX Main phone (503) 338-3358 Jeremy Catt [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Clatsop County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 9am-4:30pm Services: Pediatric Developmental Assessment * Autism Spectrum Disorder Student Disability Services * Autism Spectrum Disorder Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL PROGRAMS - ENGLISH LANGUAGE LEARNER AND MIGRANT EDUCATION SERVICES PUBLIC SAFETY - NORTHWEST REGIONAL CHILD CARE RESOURCE AND REFERRAL REHABILITATION/HABILITATION SERVICES - EARLY INTERVENTION AND EARLY CHILDHOOD SPECIAL EDUCATION If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. NORTHWEST REGIONAL EDUCATION SERVICE DISTRICT CLATSOP SERVICE CENTER
